# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-http
  namespace: payments
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-orders-to-payments-http
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: server-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-gateway-to-payments-http
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: server-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: gateway
          namespace: ingress
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-grpc
  namespace: payments
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-orders-to-payments-grpc
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: server-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-http
  namespace: orders
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-gateway-to-orders-http
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: server-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: gateway
          namespace: ingress
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-payments-to-orders-http
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: server-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payments
          namespace: payments
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-http
  namespace: inventory
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-orders-to-inventory-http
  namespace: inventory
spec:
  server:
    name: server-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-http
  namespace: users
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: users
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-gateway-to-users-http
  namespace: users
spec:
  server:
    name: server-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: gateway
          namespace: ingress
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-orders-to-users-http
  namespace: users
spec:
  server:
    name: server-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-metrics
  namespace: payments
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-prometheus-to-payments-metrics
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: server-metrics
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-metrics
  namespace: orders
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---

    name: server-metrics

    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring

      app: users
